name: AI-Powered Portfolio Assistant
desc: Voice-enabled portfolio with AI chatbot using Groq LLM, STT & TTS for interactive navigation and smart responses.

name: Travel Planner API
desc: RESTful API built with ASP.NET Core for managing trips with JWT authentication and SQL Server integration.

name: Food Delivery Website

name: Pharma AI Chatbot
desc: AI-powered medical assistant built using Dialogflow with NLP and ML models. Users can input symptoms, receive suggested medical specialties, and get doctor recommendations with details like location, fees, and appointment schedule.

name: NiT International Website
desc: Business website with improved UI, optimized navigation, and structured product pages.
